verdict: No allowed current-surface premise fixes the scalar source normalization kappa_s.  The logdet source generator, SSB identity, same-1PI product, and Feynman-Hellmann response are all useful but source-reparametrization covariant.  Existing EW/Higgs structural notes, R_conn/color projection, H_unit, and observed targets cannot be used as clean proof inputs for this bridge.  PR #230 retained closure still requires the named source-to-canonical-Higgs LSZ theorem or direct production physical-response evidence.
